docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,125.00 FILED BY LEE, NGAN CHAU LAW, LUN KI AS TO DEFENDANT 799 SVN LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, NGAN CHAU LAW, LUN KI AS TO DEFENDANT 799 SVN LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROSS SCHOMAKER FILED BY DEFENDANT 799 SVN LLC

THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THIS LAWSUIT WAS PREVIOUSLY LITIGATED IN A PRIOR LAWSUIT, NGAN CHAU LEE ET AL VS. 799 SVN LLC, CSM 25-870288, AND SETTLED IN MEDIATION. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED A BASIS TO VACATE THE PRIOR SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF HAS CONFIRMED THE ADDRESS TO WHICH DEFENDANT SHALL SEND THE PAYMENT PREVIOUSLY AGREED TO IN THE SETTLEMENT ($500), AND DEFENDANT SHALL SEND THAT PAYMENT WITHIN TEN BUSINESS DAYS OF THIS ORDER. BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS NGAN CHAU LEE AND LUN KI LAW ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT 799 SVN LLC (ROSS SCHOMAKER) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAW, LUN KI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEE, NGAN CHAU LAW, LUN KI

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, NGAN CHAU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 799 SVN LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LEE, NGAN CHAU 799 SVN LLC
